meaning: n.专家政治论者,技术统治论者
examples: In short, he is a technocrat.
Mr Makoni, a respected technocrat, has at least a chance.
He asked the technocrat, 'Would you send your wife to such a hospital?
German technocrat though he is, Freymann also has doubts about the reliability of automatic collision-avoidance systems.
But he never managed to brush off his image as a heartless, arrogant technocrat.
